wizard.title: Board advisor
wizard.lead: Five quick questions — and we'll show you which board fits you.

passenger.q: Will you take a passenger along?

water.q: Where will you paddle most often?

use.q: What will you mainly use it for?

error.invalidWeight: Enter your body weight between 30 and 200 kg to continue.

result.title: Your boards
result.empty: We didn't find a board for these criteria — try loosening the budget or storage filter.

reason.volume: The {{volume}} l volume gives comfortable headroom at {{level}} level.
reason.stability: Wide, stable board — confident for a {{level}} paddler.
reason.maxLoad: The {{maxLoad}} kg load capacity easily handles the {{effWeight}} kg load.
reason.value: Good value: {{price}} Ft within your range.
